name: wxcode/admin-slate-commerce
title: Slate Commerce Admin
description: A clean, light-mode e-commerce back-office dashboard with warm neutral surfaces, emerald accents, and amber highlights. Ships with a sidebar store switcher, topbar date range selector, four KPI cards with inline sparklines, a revenue bar chart, a recent orders table with status badges, and a top products list — everything a merchant needs at a glance.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation

query.en: Build me a light-mode e-commerce back-office dashboard — sidebar with store switcher, topbar with date range, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a revenue bar chart, a recent orders table with status badges, and a top products list.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a light-mode e-commerce back-office dashboard — sidebar with store switcher, topbar with date range, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a revenue bar chart, a recent orders table with status badges, and a top products list.
